name: church-central-monorepo
description: Church Central - Event Planning & Information Sharing for CCI Switzerland

scripts.start: concurrently "cd backend && npm start" "cd frontend && npm start"
scripts.build: concurrently "cd backend && npm build" "cd frontend && npm build"
scripts.test: concurrently "cd backend && npm test" "cd frontend && npm test"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install

author: Church Central Team
